name: get_address_blocks
full_help:
get_address_blocks

Description: 
Get Address Blocks.

Syntax: 
get_address_blocks  [-type <arg>] [-access <arg>] [-block <arg>] [-quiet]
                    [-verbose] [<path>]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-type]     Filter by Address Block type (e.g. register).
  [-access]   Filter by Address Block access (e.g. read_write).
  [-block]    Current block.
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<path>]    Address Block path to search.

Categories:

arguments.description: Filter by Address Block type (e.g. register).
Filter by Address Block access (e.g. read_write).
Suspend message limits during command execution
